name: Intikhab Khursheed
summary: I build scalable AI-powered web applications with modern technologies. Experienced in full-stack development, REST APIs, JWT authentication, and production deployment.
about: Passionate about building solutions that combine strong user experience with reliable engineering. I have spent 2+ years shipping production-grade applications across healthcare, SaaS, real estate, and productivity domains.
contactIntro: Ready to start your next project? Let's discuss how we can turn ideas into a polished product with a strong user experience.

projects.title: CareOS
projects.subtitle: AI Hospital Management System
projects.description: Production-ready hospital management system with Grok AI for clinical notes, drug interaction checks, real-time alerts with Socket.io, and role-based access for 8 user types.

projects.title: NexusCRM
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Sales Intelligence Platform
projects.description: A multi-tenant CRM for small and mid-sized businesses with AI deal scoring, revenue forecasting, personalized outreach, and subscription-ready SaaS architecture.

projects.title: Nexus AI
projects.subtitle: AI Project Planning Platform
projects.description: AI-powered task breakdowns and intelligent workflow management with interactive planning dashboards for teams and solo builders.

projects.title: EstateIQ
projects.subtitle: AI Real Estate Platform
projects.description: Property listing, valuation, and AI-powered investment scoring with natural language search and Gemini-driven property intelligence across Pakistan and the Middle East.

projects.title: CampaignForge
projects.subtitle: Campaign Management Platform
projects.description: A modern campaign management platform with protected routes, dashboards, task assignment, analytics, and secure session-based authentication.

projects.title: TaskFlow
projects.subtitle: Smart Task Manager
projects.description: A polished task management app with Kanban boards, filters, drag-and-drop, search, and real-time Firebase sync.

projects.title: Invoice Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Billing & Tracking System
projects.description: Full-stack invoice management platform for freelancers and small businesses to create, manage, and track invoices with a responsive dashboard.

projects.title: DHQ Hospital
projects.subtitle: Desktop Management System
projects.description: Offline-first desktop application for patient management, appointment scheduling, and medical records with Windows and macOS compatibility.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Building EstateIQ, an AI-driven real estate platform.
Leading full-stack development and production deployment.

experience.title: Frontend Developer (MERN Stack)
bullets: Developed healthcare app frontend using Angular.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Worked on CareOS, Nexus AI, and other SaaS apps.

testimonial.quote: Intikhab is a dependable full stack developer who delivers high-quality work, communicates clearly, and understands modern product requirements.
